notes: Fixes banner setup buttons that did not react inside the Banner menu.
Root cause: comments_banner:* callback routes were not part of the base menu route allow-list, so the bridge skipped them before the banner flow could receive them.

Added direct router for comments_banner:home, comments_banner:toggle, comments_banner:edit_text, comments_banner:edit_url, comments_banner:edit_button, comments_banner:preview, comments_banner:clear and comments_banner:cancel.
Banner setup flow from CC6.5.8.3 remains included: text, link/action, button text, preview, clear and enabled status.
The fix touches only comments_banner:* callbacks and does not change OpenApp comments launch.
Comments enable/disable, main route guard, post registry sync and single active menu remain included.
